'''Nerf-pox''' was a virus that affected [[Nerf/Legends|nerfs]] as well as [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaanian]] youths. [[Trevor Insevade]] caught it in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

{{Stub}}
